abilities.name: Hard to Wound +1
abilities.description: Damage flips against this character suffer -.

abilities.name: Pounce
abilities.description: When enemy ends push or move within engagement range not part of Walk or Charge, may immediately take (1) AP Close Combat attack.

actions: (1) Teeth and Nails (Pugilism) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage.

(1) Lure (Bewitch) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: 18 | Resist: Wp | Living target moves yards equal to its Walk toward this character. Mask Confusing Feelings: Target gains Confusing Feelings Condition until end of next turn (suffers - on all defense duels).
(1) Undress (Bewitch) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: 6 | Resist: Wp | Living target becomes Slow.
system.notes: Disturbingly attractive in moldering dresses. Lurk near old haunts. Hide decaying faces until prey close. Fresher Belles can giggle and sway invitingly.
